title: crataegus crus-galli var. exigua
intro: Crataegus crus-galli var. exigua, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant that is native to China and is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure, cholesterol levels, and inflammation. The health benefits of Crataegus crus-galli var. exigua include its potential to lower the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. It is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
